title: xylocarpus zollingeri
intro: Xylocarpus zollingeri, also known as the yellow or yellow mangrove, is a species of mangrove tree that belongs to the family Meliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Xylocarpus zollingeri include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Xylocarpus zollingeri can be prepared in various forms, including an oil infusion, a decoction, and a powder, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
